overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt walking along a coastal cliff path at night during a storm. He holds the Igni sign flame to illuminate the dark, atmospheric fantasy environment with stormy skies and distant landscapes visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with wooden fortifications

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the narrow cliffside path, holding the Igni flame to illuminate the wooden stakes and rocky terrain ahead

entered.detail: vertical wooden stakes arranged in a barrier formation along the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding along the edge of a cliff overlooking dark water
dark water visible below the cliff edge to the left
silhouetted forest and hills on the horizon beneath storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cliffside dirt path at night, with Geralt walking forward holding a magical flame. Wooden fortification stakes line the right side of the path while dark coastal waters are visible far below to the left. Storm clouds cover the sky and distant wooded hills are silhouetted on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal grassland path with expansive water views

events.description: passing the wooden fortifications, the landscape opens up to wider coastal grassland with expansive views of the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the winding path as the terrain opens up, revealing more of the surrounding grassland and distant shoreline across the water

entered.detail: scattered red wooden planks and debris on the left side of the path
distant landmass and shoreline becoming visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the wooden stakes fall behind, revealing a wider coastal grassland with tall vegetation on both sides. The terrain offers expansive views of the coastal waters and distant shoreline, with scattered red wooden debris appearing on the left as Geralt continues his journey along the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark, stormy cliffside that transitions from a confined fortification path into an expansive coastal grassland. It begins on a narrow dirt trail where Geralt walks forward with a magical flame, flanked by wooden fortification stakes and the dark waters of the coast far below. As the camera advances, the wooden stakes fall away and the path opens up, shifting the environment from a restricted corridor to a wider plateau of tall vegetation. The scene then expands to reveal a broader vista of the shoreline and distant wooded hills under a heavy storm sky, with scattered red wooden debris appearing along the cliff edge as the journey continues.
